text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've been pretty busy recently, huh? I've been
working super hard!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And I'm going to work super hard today, too! And
I think I'll start by tidying these shelves! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whoops... I'm sorry. My hand slipped! But it's not
broken, so don't worry! I'll be more careful from
now on!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Okay... I'll just put this in this drawer—OW!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I trapped my finger in the drawer... That really
smarts...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I'm fine, I'm fine! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆
Awesome fortune! ☆ I'm doing great, as usual!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It's obvious she's putting on a show. Maybe all
the races she's been running lately are taking
their toll on her... I should adjust her schedule.
